headline: Is BioNTech SE (BNTX) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: We came across a bullish thesis on BioNTech SE on Memyselfandi007’s Substack. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on BNTX. BioNTech SE’s share was trading at $103.80 as of March 4th. BNTX’s trailing and forward P/E were 166.87 and 7.04 respectively according to Yahoo Finance. BioNTech SE (BNTX) has transitioned from a COVID-19 vaccine pioneer […]

headline: Pfizer Bladder Cancer Trial Results Deepen Oncology Growth And Risk Debate
summary: Pfizer (NYSE:PFE) and Astellas Pharma reported positive pivotal Phase 3 results for PADCEV plus Keytruda in muscle invasive bladder cancer. The EV-304 (KEYNOTE-B15) trial showed a substantial reduction in tumor recurrence, progression, or death compared with standard chemotherapy. Data also pointed to a consistent safety profile for the combination regimen. The companies signaled that regulatory filings based on these results are expected. For you as an investor, this update sits at the...

headline: Argus Turns Bullish on Pfizer (PFE), Highlights GLP-1 and Oncology Pipeline
summary: Pfizer Inc. (NYSE:PFE) is included among the 14 Best Dividend Stocks to Invest in Under $50. On March 2, Argus upgraded Pfizer Inc. (NYSE:PFE) to Buy from Hold.
